← All Mockups

Brilliance OS Surface System

One platform, many surfaces

Each chat-concept becomes a different surface tuned to a specific posture. The platform's grammar is "the right surface for the right thinking" - not one chat bolted into every view. Click any surface to see its concept demo.

How to read this map. Each card below is a surface in the Brilliance OS, with the chat-concept that defines its visual treatment, the question it answers, and a status badge: NEW (new view), REPLACE (existing view, new chrome), CLASSIC (current chrome unchanged), MODE (universal modifier). Click into any card to view its concept demo with Desktop / Mobile tabs. Read the full architecture at docs/brilliance/12-surface-system.md.
Tier i.

Ship in v33.0

Highest impact. Lowest refactor cost. The Welcome Release surfaces.

Chat Replace

Concept: Concierge Desk

"Help me with what's relevant today."

Brilliance greets you with what's active across Pulse, Bloom, Studio runs, and today's calendar. You make a request; the platform handles it directly or routes to the right specialist agent. Replaces the current centered-blob landing.

Internal: agent viewView demo →
History Replace

Concept: Time Ribbon

"What did I ask, and when?"

Horizontal scrubbing timeline. Each conversation moment is a chapter mark. Drag to revisit. Edit any past message to branch a new conversation from that point. Search filters markers by topic. Replaces the current History list view.

Internal: tuning viewView demo →
Focus Mode Mode

Concept: Negative Space

"Quiet everything else."

Universal modifier triggered by Cmd+Shift+F. Strips any active surface to: one message, Brilli, an input. Past collapses to a tiny gold dot. Sidebar collapses. Auto-trigger on 30s of idle. Esc to exit.

Modifier on any viewView demo →
Tier ii.

Ship in v33.x (post-launch)

Moderate refactor. Existing surfaces gain new chrome. Classic mode toggle preserved for 90 days.

Studio Replace

Concept: Split-Pane Workspace

"Make this thing while I watch."

Left pane: conversation. Right pane: live artifact streaming as Brilliance creates it. Brilli sits in the gutter showing where attention flows. Drag the divider to focus on chat or output.

Internal: studio viewView demo →
Folio Replace

Concept: Studio at Work

"Help me create the artifact itself."

Easel center with the artifact prominent. Tools on a left rail (operations, automations, library items). Conversation on the right contextualized to this artifact. The artifact is the work; everything orbits it.

Internal: folio viewView demo →
Notebook Replace + rename

Concept: Letter Series

"I want to write something carefully."

Long-form writing surface. Cream-paper theme option, gold initial caps, marginalia from Brilliance in the right gutter. Wax-seal animation on completion. Renames Scribe to Notebook (Scribe was an internal codename).

Internal: scribe view (renamed)View demo →
Tier iii.

Ship in v34

New view. Larger investment. Worth the wait.

Thought Board New view

Concept: Branching Pinboard / Spatial Constellation

"I want to explore an idea from many angles."

A new free-form surface for research and multi-thread exploration. Two view modes (toggle): Pinboard for active manipulation (drag/pin/branch), Constellation for navigation (zoom to see the whole conversation as a shape). Cards link manually or via Brilliance suggestions.

Internal: NEW data-view="board"View demo →
Thought Board (constellation) View mode

Concept: Spatial Constellation

"Show me the shape of my thinking."

Same Thought Board, alternate lens. 2D zoomable canvas. Messages cluster by topic via embeddings. Long conversations become navigable artifacts. Toggle from Pinboard via the top-right control.

Same data, different viewView demo →
Tier 0.

Classic surfaces (chrome unchanged)

Existing surfaces that keep their current chrome. Brilli embeds where appropriate but the layout is right as-is.

Pulse Classic

"What does my day, week, portfolio look like?"

Already excellent. Goals, calendar, today, stats in one frame. Brilli appears as an inline status dot in the sidebar; Brilli pulses on automation completion.

Identity Classic

"Configure who I am to the platform."

Brand and life identity configuration. Stays as it is; the new presence (Brilli) reads from these fields. No chrome change needed.

Library Classic

"Where is my work archived?"

Finder-style archive. Empty states get a small Brilli per the entity spec. Otherwise unchanged.

Bloom Classic

"Generate brand content at scale."

Continuously generated brand feed. The launch popup gets Brilli. Otherwise unchanged.

Automations Classic

"Schedule and orchestrate work."

Multi-step pipelines, scheduled tasks, workflow presets. Visual unchanged; Brilli pulses on automation completion via sidebar status.

Mail Classic

"Compose and send."

Outbox, Sent, Compose, Inbox tabs. Email templates rebrand to Brilliance per the surface rebrand pass. Chrome unchanged.

Settings Classic

"Configure the platform."

Standard settings panel. Gains "Brilliance presence" picker (7 forms incl. Classic BLAKE), "Animate Brilli" toggle, surface mode toggles for power users.

Coherence rules

  1. Brilli is the same in every surface. One presence, many surfaces. Whether you're at the Concierge Desk or the Thought Board, Brilli looks identical and behaves identically.
  2. Old Standard TT for headlines, DM Sans for body. No font drift across surfaces.
  3. Gold palette is universal. Per-brand accent colors override gold ONLY in brand-mode surfaces (Studio, Folio, Bloom, Pulse). Gold is the platform color.
  4. Each surface answers ONE question. If you're asking two questions on one surface, you're in the wrong surface - Brilliance suggests moving you.
  5. Cross-surface deep links. Pinning a Chat message on Thought Board keeps the link live. History scrubbing jumps to any past surface. The platform is unified by content, not by chat.
  6. Brilliance always knows where you are. The system prompt for Brilli always includes the active surface, so suggestions are surface-appropriate.
  7. Classic mode for 90 days. Existing power users can toggle back to v32.x chrome on Studio, Folio, Notebook for transition comfort.

Brilliance · by RoweOS · Surface System · v33.0 architecture
